producer_notes: Foundry Collector runs entirely on the owner's machine and never transmits data externally. Sealing to a Vault capsule happens client-side; LoopXXI Vault infrastructure only ever receives the opaque envelope if the owner chooses to sync or list it.

attestation.notes: Mode is an explicit allowlist; unknown modes fail closed. poc_local receipts carry provenanceLevel local_export and never claim an authenticated session. production_server responses are verified against the pinned key before a capsule is emitted.

exporter.input: a signed Agent Outcome Capsule (AOC) v0.1.0
exporter.aoc_verification: The inner AOC stored hash and owner signature are verified against the supplied public key before sealing; fails closed on mismatch.
